title: taraxacum hjeltii
intro: Taraxacum hjeltii, also known as the Hjelte's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a herbaceous perennial that is native to Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and gastritis. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum hjeltii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved digestion.
